D

Departure - Class in com.transportapp.model
Represents a departure (bus or train) from one station to another.
Departure() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Default constructor required for deserialization.
Departure(String, String, String, String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.transportapp.model.Departure
Constructs a new Departure with all necessary details.
departures - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Station
A list of departures (bus and train) from this station.
departures - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.TransportData
A list of departures (either bus or train).
departureTime - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
The departure time in format "HH:mm".
DimensionInputDialog - Class in com.transportapp.gui
A dialog window that allows the user to input the dimensions of the map.
DimensionInputDialog() - Constructor for class com.transportapp.gui.DimensionInputDialog
 
drawGraphWithRoute(List<Departure>) - Method in class com.transportapp.gui.GraphVisualizer
Draws the transport graph with a highlighted route.
duration - Variable in class com.transportapp.model.Departure
The duration of the trip in minutes.
